lens: system design — judge whether the structure is sound and will hold up as load grows (coupling, cohesion, boundaries, state ownership, behaviour under scale)
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness (sysdesign.py), the spec scorer (sysdesign_spec.py), the judge scorer (judge/code-review/system-design/score.py), and the golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/system-design/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (sd-001, sd-002, ...).
